title: WazaPack
description: "Waza Meme" Themed Texture Pack (Black And White)
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afa2f551bfa358c492b3e2c7facda7b53e780324.png)
**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v1.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
1.12.2 | 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Service, Black, White, 32x, Wazaaa

**Description:**
> WazaPack is another texture pack I originally created for version 1.12.2. This pack was initially designed as a way to support a specific community or team that was active at the time. In the end, I completed it, and I loved the design so much that I decided to update it for modern versions. What truly inspired me to update it was the custom totem design—so here it is! The pack includes everything needed for the latest versions, so you don’t have to worry about missing textures.

> This texture pack is diamond-only, but you can download the Netherite version here!

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv>
